key.name: music-folder
key.summary: Legacy music folder path (migrated to music-folders)

key.name: folder-display-names
key.summary: Pairs of internal_path, display_name for portal path mapping

key.summary: Audio output backend (auto, hifi, or standard)

key.summary: Hide Bad Bunny songs and folders from the library
